name: Slack
description: Slack API enables bots and apps to send messages, manage channels, upload files, and interact with users and workspaces. Access workspace data programmatically for team communication, file sharing, and workflow automation.

capabilities.name: post_message
capabilities.description: Send a message to a Slack channel or direct message. Supports text, blocks, and attachments for rich formatting.

capabilities.name: list_channels
capabilities.description: Retrieve a list of all channels in the workspace. Get channel names, IDs, topics, and membership information.

capabilities.name: get_channel_history
capabilities.description: Fetch message history from a Slack channel. Retrieve messages, timestamps, and sender information for a specific period.

capabilities.name: upload_file
capabilities.description: Upload a file to Slack and share it in a channel. Supports all file types with optional titles and comments.

capabilities.name: list_users
capabilities.description: Get a list of all users in the workspace. Retrieve user IDs, names, emails, and status information.

capabilities.name: search_messages
capabilities.description: Search for messages across the workspace using keywords and filters. Find messages by content, date, and user.

capabilities.name: add_reaction
capabilities.description: Add an emoji reaction to a message. Express sentiment or acknowledge messages with emoji reactions.
